name: Screen System

ux_decisions.decision: Use screen groups aligned to public, private trip, private event, and admin scopes.
ux_decisions.rationale: The architecture has explicit trust and data boundaries across these scopes.

screen_inventory.name: Public Trip Page
screen_inventory.purpose: Show selected public trip summary, updates, and external contribution CTA.

screen_inventory.name: External Contribution Return
screen_inventory.purpose: Confirm return from provider when available and explain provider-owned status.

screen_inventory.name: Trip Creation
screen_inventory.purpose: Create trip basics and save draft.

screen_inventory.name: Visibility and Public Page Settings
screen_inventory.purpose: Configure public/private content boundaries and publication state.

screen_inventory.name: External Contribution Setup
screen_inventory.purpose: Configure provider link or campaign reference without Crewly payout controls.

screen_inventory.name: Private Trip Overview
screen_inventory.purpose: Orient members to trip status, updates, and next actions.

screen_inventory.name: Trip Ledger
screen_inventory.purpose: Show trip expenses and separate external contribution references.

screen_inventory.name: Receipt Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: Review original receipt, OCR extraction, translation, display FX, and corrections.

screen_inventory.name: Bulletins
screen_inventory.purpose: Create and view member-only or public updates.

screen_inventory.name: Member Album
screen_inventory.purpose: Upload member-only photos and promote selected public highlights.

screen_inventory.name: Private Events List
screen_inventory.purpose: Create and access participant-scoped event spaces.

screen_inventory.name: Private Event Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: Show event participants, expenses, and event-specific balances.

screen_inventory.name: Event Payment Status
screen_inventory.purpose: Update tracking-only payment status without in-app settlement.

screen_inventory.name: Audit Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: Inspect audit events and provider references for support.

risks_and_constraints.risk: Trip Ledger screen could become overloaded by expenses, contribution references, and event summaries.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Separate sections and summaries; never merge event balances into trip totals.

stage_5_handoff_notes: Each screen should become a Stage 5 implementation slice or sub-slice with explicit API and permission mapping.
